summary: Only one positive scenario and one test case are provided for the Account Login function. The test scope includes positive, negative, validation, boundary, business rule, security, UX/UI, and integration categories, but the current coverage is extremely limited. Many required test categories are missing, and the single test case lacks traceability to all relevant requirement IDs.

missing_scenarios.reason: No negative scenario for login with unverified email (user must verify before first login).
No negative scenario for login with incorrect password.
No negative scenario for login with non-existent email.
No boundary scenario for login with password exactly 8 characters (valid).
No boundary scenario for login with password exactly 12 characters (valid).
No business rule scenario for login after verification link has expired (24 hours).
No security scenario for brute-force login attempts (e.g., multiple failed logins).
No UX/UI scenario for inline error messages on login failure (e.g., invalid credentials).
No integration scenario for login when email verification service is down (though login itself may not depend on email service, the verification status check is server-side).

weak_testcases.issue: Test data uses a hardcoded email and password; no mention of how the user is verified (precondition assumes verification but no step to confirm).
weak_testcases.recommendation: Add a precondition step to confirm the user's email is verified in the system (e.g., via database state).

missing_testcases.title: Login with unverified email should fail
missing_testcases.reason: Requirement states email verification is mandatory before first login.

missing_testcases.title: Login with incorrect password should show error
missing_testcases.reason: Negative test for invalid credentials is standard for login function.

missing_testcases.title: Login with non-existent email should show error
Login with password exactly 8 characters (valid) should succeed
missing_testcases.reason: Boundary test for minimum password length.

missing_testcases.title: Login with password exactly 12 characters (valid) should succeed
missing_testcases.reason: Boundary test for maximum password length.

missing_testcases.title: Login after verification link has expired should fail
missing_testcases.reason: Business rule: verification link expires after 24 hours.

missing_testcases.title: Login with multiple failed attempts should trigger lockout or rate limiting
missing_testcases.reason: Security test for brute-force prevention (traceable to test scope security category).

missing_testcases.title: Login failure should display meaningful inline error message
missing_testcases.reason: UX/UI test for error messages on login failure.

traceability_issues.issue: Test case TC050 is traceable only to FR002, but the scenario SC031 also references FR002. No other requirement IDs are present.
traceability_issues.recommendation: Ensure all related requirement IDs from the requirement summary are included if applicable (e.g., FR002 is the only one for login). No change needed.

recommendations.description: Add test cases for negative, boundary, business rule, security, and UX/UI scenarios as listed in missing_testcases.
In TC050, add a precondition step to explicitly confirm the user's email verification status in the system (e.g., via database query or API call).
